description_long: This street cabinet is a rectangular, industrial-grade metal enclosure with a weathered, gray finish and visible signs of rust and wear. The front panel features a control interface with several buttons, switches, and indicator lights, as well as a prominent red and white PRAMAC logo. One end of the cabinet has a large ventilation grille, a circular emergency stop button, and a warning label, while the opposite end is mostly plain with a small access handle. The top surface includes a circular access hatch or cap, likely for maintenance or refueling. The cabinet stands on four short legs, elevating it slightly above the ground, and its robust construction suggests it is designed to house electrical or mechanical equipment in urban environments. The overall appearance indicates durability and functionality, suitable for outdoor installation.
description: A weathered, industrial metal street cabinet with control panels, ventilation grilles, and a PRAMAC logo, designed for outdoor utility use. It features a rugged, gray finish and multiple interactive components.
description_view_0: This view shows the end panel with a large ventilation grille, a circular emergency stop button, and a warning label.
description_view_1: This side displays the main control interface with buttons, switches, indicator lights, and the PRAMAC logo prominently in the center.
description_view_2: This end is mostly plain, featuring a small access handle and a circular hatch on the top surface.
description_view_3: This view shows the plain rear panel with no visible controls or grilles, only the weathered metal surface and the top hatch.
attribute_placement_of_warning_labels_or: front panel, near emergency stop button
